mapper.select: SELECT tool_key, tool_json, enabled, timeout_ms, max_retries, user_id FROM agent_tools WHERE enabled = 1

SELECT tool_key, tool_json, enabled, timeout_ms, max_retries, user_id FROM agent_tools WHERE enabled = 1 AND tool_key IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_tools (tool_key, tool_json, enabled, timeout_ms, max_retries, user_id) VALUES (#{toolKey}, #{toolJson}, 1, 30000, 3, #{userId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tool_json = VALUES(tool_json), upd_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_tools SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE tool_key = #{toolKey}
